checked_dimensions.name: spec_compliance
checked_dimensions.evidence: Issue 134 follows the established governance pattern. Execution contract, scope manifest, evidence, and run envelope created. Combined apply-mode operation limited to issue_close, pr_open, and merge — all supported by the current pilot scope guard.

checked_dimensions.evidence: Governance package prepared. This PR records preparation artifacts. Local apply-mode execution will be performed in a separate governed session with full gate evidence.

checked_dimensions.evidence: All changed files within declared scope. No protected paths touched.

checked_dimensions.name: test_evidence

checked_dimensions.evidence: Final report accurately describes this as a preparation package. It explicitly states local apply-mode execution was not performed in this connector session.
